CineMatchPage.meta_description: Get paired on your CinePersona axes and the films you've actually watched. Every introduction clears 90% similarity, with mutual consent before any chat opens.
CineMatchPage.hero_title: Find people whose taste lines up with yours.
CineMatchPage.hero_subtitle: CineMatch pairs you on your CinePersona axes and the films you've actually watched. Every introduction clears 90% similarity — never a stranger who just happens to share three blockbusters.
CineMatchPage.steps_subtitle: Three steps, in order. No swiping, no ranking strangers' faces, no decoy options.
CineMatchPage.step1_body: Your CinePersona axes and the films you've marked watched become visible to the matcher — no profile photo, no bio shopping.
CineMatchPage.step2_body: We page you the moment someone clears 90% similarity. If nobody does, the closest candidate becomes a fallback after 7 days.
CineMatchPage.step3_body: Either party can accept. The conversation only opens once both of you tap consent — no inbox creep, no cold DMs.
CineMatchPage.feature1_body: Scored 70% on personality axes, 30% on the films you've both watched.
CineMatchPage.feature2_body: Either side can decline silently. Chat opens only when both tap accept — no rejection, no inbox spam.
CineMatchPage.feature3_body: Free during early access. Three weekly requests is the rate while we keep the pool intentional.
CineMatchPage.anatomy_subtitle: Similarity is one number, but the breakdown is four. Each axis shows where two viewers actually meet — and how far apart they still are. The smaller the delta, the closer the read.
CineMatchPage.anatomy_point_1: 70% of the score is personality axes
CineMatchPage.anatomy_point_2: 30% is the films you've both marked watched
CineMatchPage.anatomy_point_3: Below 90%, nothing is shown — quiet pool, no noise
CineMatchPage.faq_subtitle: The bar, the fallback, and what a match can actually see.
CineMatchPage.faq_a1: Below 90% the overlap feels generic — same family, different room. The bar is set high so the first hour of conversation skips the small talk.
CineMatchPage.faq_a2: Your request keeps searching for 7 days. If the bar isn't cleared by then, the closest available person is offered as a fallback — clearly labelled so you can pass.
CineMatchPage.faq_q3: Can my match see my real name?
CineMatchPage.faq_a3: Only your display name and CineType show up in the match. Profile details — avatar, full bio, films — are visible once both of you opt in to chat.
CineMatchPage.faq_q4: How do I leave the pool?
CineMatchPage.faq_a4: One tap on your pool status card. You stop being matchable immediately. Existing matches remain visible until you hide them.
CineMatchPage.cta_title: Your taste twin is on the other side.
CineMatchPage.cta_subtitle: Take the CineTest, mark twenty films you've watched, and let the matcher do the quiet work.
